'''Tuba Ancho''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who stole [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] cell shipments from [[Rozatta]]'s [[Outland Transit Station|Outland Station]], costing her hundreds of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] worth 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 [[Death/Legends|dead]] was posted, which was then claimed by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
